symptom: a swallowed object after a dare and a heavy dragging feeling in the gut but no real pain
hook: a whole metal spoon was lying inside the stomach handle down
whatYouSee: A full metal spoon is sitting inside the stomach with the bowl and handle clearly outlined.
whyItMatters: A long rigid object like this will not pass through the twists of the gut on its own and can press on or tear the wall if it is left.
treatment: It is lifted out with an endoscope passed down into the stomach so nothing has to be cut open.
takeaway: The stomach will hold far more than anyone expects.

laypersonQuestion: Would you ever swallow something on a dare?
seedHint: Look at the shape sitting in there and ask yourself if that outline seems familiar

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a swallowed object after a dare and a heavy dragging feeling in the gut but no real pain.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a whole metal spoon was lying inside the stomach handle down.

Case #73 🩻 Difficulty 1/5

Medics: your diagnosis?

Everyone else: Would you ever swallow something on a dare?

Answer in 45 min 👀 no spoilers from me till then
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Swallowed spoon

👀 What you see:
A full metal spoon is sitting inside the stomach with the bowl and handle clearly outlined.

🦴 Why it matters:
A long rigid object like this will not pass through the twists of the gut on its own and can press on or tear the wall if it is left.

💊 Treatment:

It is lifted out with an endoscope passed down into the stomach so nothing has to be cut open.
